audit_result.proof_trace: Gossip path validates index range before KZG verification (L480→L535). RPC path performs KZG verification without index validation (L247-249), then silently filters invalid indices (L261). This allows attackers to force expensive KZG operations on invalid data without penalty.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Malicious peer sends DataColumnsByRoot responses with index >= 128. Node performs costly KZG verification before filtering. Attacker repeats to exhaust CPU resources. No peer penalty applied since validation succeeds but columns are silently dropped.

PROP-6a4369e9-inv-008.text: sidecar.index must be in range [0, NUMBER_OF_COLUMNS) to be accepted.
PROP-6a4369e9-inv-008.assertion: forall sidecar: accepted(sidecar) => sidecar.index >= 0 && sidecar.index < NUMBER_OF_COLUMNS
